news.t: XAIX, AGIX: Two Best Artificial Intelligence (AI) ETFs to Buy Now
Xtrackers by DWS Launches Artificial Intelligence and Big Data ETF XAIX

holdings.infoBox: XAIX is an equity ETF with a total of 94 individual holdings. The top holdings are Samsung Electronics stock at 7.19%, Micron Technology at 5.89%, SK hynix at 5.27%, Intel at 4.96%, and Alphabet at 4.95%.

overview.description: The Xtrackers Artificial Intelligence and Big Data ETF (XAIX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq Global AI and Big Data index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of companies with exposure to the broad theme of artificial intelligence and big data. The funds selection process considers its tie to specific sub-themes and various factors. XAIX was launched on Aug 2, 2024 and is issued by Xtrackers.
infoTable: Nasdaq Global AI and Big Data Index
